html:
Hi I'm Jia Wei, a software developer passionate about building great user experiences. I can turn a design into a real working website with responsive design.

Recently I've been building AI-powered systems — including a RAG agent backed by Supabase pgvector and LangGraph deployed on Cloudflare Workers, and an AI expense agent with multimodal function calling and human-in-the-loop flows. I'm interested in the full applied AI stack: retrieval, agent orchestration, observability, and reliability.

I graduated from Universiti Utara Malaysia with a degree in Bachelor of Science (Multimedia).

I am a positive thinker, and I think this helps me the most in difficult moments.
